old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-m1ln","title":"[cross-impl] DIO reserved byte handling inconsistent","description":"Python (python/src/lichen/rpl/messages.py:169) now enforces data[7]==0 per RFC 6550 §6.3 in DIO.from_bytes (raises RplError). Rust (rust/lichen-rpl/src/message.rs:116-119 Dio::from_bytes skips index 7, takes dodag_id from 8..24) and Zephyr C (lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/messages.c:48-49 lichen_rpl_dio_parse reads flags[6], dodag[8..] ignores byte 7). All set byte 7=0 on tx (consistent). Different rejection behavior on non-zero reserved. Reviewed commits 2ff4962dd (Python RPL), cbf216397 (Zephyr COAP merge), and bd metadata. Other commits were bead auto-updates with no code impact.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-22T23:48:46.554720365Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:48:46.554720365Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-m1ln","title":"[cross-impl] DIO reserved byte handling inconsistent","description":"Python (python/src/lichen/rpl/messages.py:169) now enforces data[7]==0 per RFC 6550 §6.3 in DIO.from_bytes (raises RplError). Rust (rust/lichen-rpl/src/message.rs:116-119 Dio::from_bytes skips index 7, takes dodag_id from 8..24) and Zephyr C (lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/messages.c:48-49 lichen_rpl_dio_parse reads flags[6], dodag[8..] ignores byte 7). All set byte 7=0 on tx (consistent). Different rejection behavior on non-zero reserved. Reviewed commits 2ff4962dd (Python RPL), cbf216397 (Zephyr COAP merge), and bd metadata. Other commits were bead auto-updates with no code impact.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-22T23:48:46.554720365Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T03:32:17.740560656Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T03:32:17.740560656Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T03:37:17.740560656Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T03:32:17.740560656Z"}

new_value: Fixed cross-impl DIO reserved byte validation per RFC 6550 §6.3 in Rust and C to match Python. Added checks returning InvalidOption / LICHEN_RPL_ERR_BAD_OPT on nonzero byte 7. Tests/vectors unchanged as they use zero. Commit 65ced09e1
